strategy: Tiny Death boss (960 health). She takes +30% from Life and resists Death. Hit with Life or a non-Death school.
She summons a Cold Confusion minion and resummons it a round or two after it dies. Do not chase the minion; just blade and burst her down.
One or two blades and a Life hit end it before the minion matters.
cheatNotes: She keeps summoning a Cold Confusion minion, respawning it after it dies. Ignore the minion and race Jordyn's low health instead of clearing adds.
